mapper.select: SELECT G.GUEST_ID, G.WEDDING_ID, G.GUEST_NAME, G.MAIL_ADDRESS, G.PRECAUTION, G.ATTENDANCE, G.ANS_FLAG, G.DELETE_FLAG, A.allergy_id As ALLERGY_ID, A.allergy_name As ALLERGY_NAME FROM guests G LEFT OUTER JOIN guests_allergies GA ON G.guest_id = GA.guest_id LEFT OUTER JOIN allergies A ON GA.allergy_id = A.allergy_id WHERE wedding_id = #{weddingId} And delete_flag = false

SELECT G.GUEST_ID, G.WEDDING_ID, G.GUEST_NAME, G.MAIL_ADDRESS, G.PRECAUTION, G.ATTENDANCE, G.ANS_FLAG, G.DELETE_FLAG, A.allergy_id As ALLERGY_ID, A.allergy_name As ALLERGY_NAME FROM guests G LEFT OUTER JOIN guests_allergies GA ON G.guest_id = GA.guest_id LEFT OUTER JOIN allergies A ON GA.allergy_id = A.allergy_id WHERE G.guest_id = #{guestId} And delete_flag = false
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO guests ( GUEST_ID, WEDDING_ID, GUEST_NAME, MAIL_ADDRESS, PRECAUTION, ATTENDANCE, ANS_FLAG, DELETE_FLAG ) VALUES ( #{guestId}, #{weddingId}, #{guestName}, #{mailAddress}, #{precaution}, #{attendance}, #{ansFlg}, #{deleteFlg} )
mapper.update: UPDATE guests SET guest_name = #{guestName}, mail_address = #{mailAddress}, precaution = #{precaution}, attendance = #{attendance}, ans_flag = #{ansFlg} WHERE guest_id = #{guestId}
UPDATE guests SET delete_flag = TRUE WHERE guest_id = #{guestId}
